commands.cmd:
raw=$(PGPASSWORD="${HOSTLENS_POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-}" PGCONNECT_TIMEOUT=5 \
  psql -tA -F'|' -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -U postgres -d postgres \
  -c "SELECT count(*), bool_and(coalesce(state::text,'') = 'streaming'), FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM max(replay_lag)))::bigint FROM pg_stat_replication") \
  || { echo "psql replication_lag failed" >&2; exit 1; }
cnt=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | awk -F'|' 'NR==1{print $1}')
link_raw=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | awk -F'|' 'NR==1{print $2}')
lag_raw=$(printf '%s' "$raw" | awk -F'|' 'NR==1{print $3}')
case "$cnt" in ''|*[!0-9]*) echo "replication count non-numeric: $cnt" >&2; exit 1;; esac
if [ "$cnt" -eq 0 ]; then
  printf '{"replication_configured":false,"link_healthy":false,"lag_seconds":null}'
  exit 0
fi
case "$link_raw" in
  t) link=true ;;
  *) link=false ;;
esac
case "$lag_raw" in
  ''|*[!0-9-]*)
    lag=null
    ;;
  *)
    lag=$lag_raw
    ;;
esac
printf '{"replication_configured":true,"link_healthy":%s,"lag_seconds":%s}' "$link" "$lag"
